ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "victim_id" TEXT /* Identifier for victims involved in the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time when the incident occurred */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location where the incident took place */,
  "incident_tehsil" INTEGER /* Tehsil (sub-district) where the incident occurred */,
  "cause_of_emergency" INTEGER /* Numeric code representing the cause of the emergency */,
  "base_to_scene_distance" REAL /* Distance from the base to the scene in kilometers */,
  "scene_to_hospital_distance" REAL /* Distance from the scene to the hospital in kilometers */,
  "roadway_feature" INTEGER /* Numeric code for any notable roadway features */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "geographic_identifier" TEXT /* Unique geographic identifier for mapping and spatial analysis */,
  "eta" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival (ETA) for the response unit */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual time of arrival for the response unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES victims ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_cause_of_emergency FOREIGN KEY ("cause_of_emergency") REFERENCES causes_of_emergency ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the victim */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the victim (e.g., stable, critical) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between victims (e.g., family member, friend) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the victim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the emergency unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit responding to the incident */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., Police, Fire, Medical) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the unit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the unit (e.g., available, en route, on scene) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the unit (e.g., number of personnel and equipment) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response log */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being logged */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emergency unit responding */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time when the unit started responding */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time when the unit departed from the base */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time when the unit arrived at the scene */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Description of actions taken by the unit */,
  "communication_records" TEXT /* Communication records (e.g., call logs, messages) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_logs_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES emergency_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roadway_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roadway feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the roadway feature (e.g., intersection, bridge) */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of roadway feature (e.g., intersection, road closure) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the roadway feature (e.g., good, hazardous) */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for maintenance of the roadway feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes_of_emergency" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause of emergency */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* Description of the cause (e.g., accident, fire) */,
  "cause_category" TEXT /* Category of the cause (e.g., natural disaster, human error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical location */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with this location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "nearby_landmarks" TEXT /* Nearby landmarks of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geo_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, responder) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents_emergency_units" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emergency unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_causes" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "cause_id")
)
